message:
fix(analytics): fix bugs found during code review

- trackJargonEngagement: now uses the category parameter to send
  jargon_engagement event with category data
- first_document_read: moved conversion from session start to
  trackDocumentView so it fires when user actually reads a document
- analytics-provider: fix race condition where load event listener
  wouldn't fire if page already loaded

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
